message.sable_quota.creation_blocked: You have reached your maximum number of physical structures (%s/%s).
message.sable_quota.split_blocked: That action would split this physical structure beyond its owner's structure limit (%s/%s).
message.sable_quota.command_creation_blo: The quota system does not allow players to run Sable commands that may create multiple structures at once.
command.sable_quota.get_unlimited: %s currently owns %s physical structures with no limit (limit source: %s).
command.sable_quota.list_invalid_page: Page %s does not exist; the last page is %s.
command.sable_quota.list_unknown: - %s: no position is available yet; it will be captured when the structure loads.
command.sable_quota.set: Set %s's personal structure limit to %s; they currently own %s. Existing structures were not removed.
command.sable_quota.set_unlimited: Set %s's personal structure limit to unlimited; they currently own %s.
command.sable_quota.adjust_unlimited: %s currently has an unlimited structure limit; set a finite limit first.
command.sable_quota.reset: Cleared %s's personal limit; their current role default is %s.
command.sable_quota.reset_no_override: %s has no personal limit override; their current role default is %s.
command.sable_quota.reload_success: Reloaded Sable Quota config: regular players=%s, operators=%s.
command.sable_quota.reload_failed: Failed to reload Sable Quota config; the previous settings remain active: %s
command.sable_quota.single_player_requir: This command requires exactly one player.
